metadata.title: QA/QC Specialist Contractor | Inspection & MDR Documentation | Pipeline Quality
metadata.description: Specialist QA/QC contractor for XXL Monopiles, Pressure Vessels, and Offshore Wind. Digital-first welding inspection and audit-ready MDR management aligned with ISO, DNV, and PED standards.

hero.title: Audit-Ready Fabrication. Delivered Right. First Time.
hero.subtitle: We help engineering teams deliver on-site QA/QC and compliant documentation for XXL Monopiles, Pressure Vessels, and Industrial Piping—aligned with ISO, DNV, and PED requirements.
hero.imageAlt: Heavy steel fabrication and welding inspection
hero.availability: Available for short-term and long-term projects across Europe.
hero.trustBadge: Specialist QA/QC contractor for offshore and industrial projects

documentationReviewModal.title: Request Technical Review
documentationReviewModal.description: Upload your ITP, RFI, or Welding Logs. Our team will perform a detailed gap analysis and provide a professional feedback report.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your documentation review needs...
form.privacyNote: Privacy Note: Your documents are transmitted via an encrypted SSL connection. Your data is used solely for service delivery and is deleted upon project completion in compliance with GDPR. Server location: Frankfurt, Germany.

intro.headline: Pipeline projects fail or succeed on documentation quality.
intro.paragraph1: We help EPCs, operators and engineering teams by delivering structured, compliant and audit-ready QA/QC documentation, without the need for permanent site presence.
intro.paragraph2: We operate as a remote QA/QC documentation partner, supporting projects across Europe.
intro.paragraph3: This allows our clients to reduce on-site workload, avoid documentation backlogs and stay audit-ready throughout the project lifecycle.
intro.point1: real project experience in large industrial environments
intro.point2: strong understanding of European standards and EPC workflows
intro.point4: focus on documentation that actually works on real projects
intro.tagline: We don't sell theory. We deliver usable documentation.
intro.description: Pipeline Quality is a specialized QA/QC documentation and project quality support service for industrial pipeline and process projects.

experience.title: Professional Background & Experience
experience.description: Over 15 years of experience in pipeline projects, QA/QC documentation, and inspection support across international standards and compliance frameworks.
experience.imageAlt: Pipeline QA/QC expert reviewing technical documents
experience.paragraph1: Our experience is based on hands-on involvement in large-scale European industrial projects, supporting QA/QC documentation, welding documentation, and final handover processes.
experience.paragraph2: Project environments include chemical, energy, and pipeline-related installations with complex documentation and compliance requirements.
experience.paragraph3: Experience gained through professional involvement in large-scale industrial projects, including projects associated with companies such as:
experience.companies: BASF, Bayernoil, Chemiepark Marl, INEOS, Yamal LNG plant, Gazprom and Rosneft.

services.title: OUR SERVICES
services.description: Specialist QA/QC contractor services for XXL Monopiles, Pressure Vessels, and Industrial Piping. We deliver on-site field inspection, welding supervision, and remote Manufacturing Data Report (MDR) management—aligned with ISO, DNV, and PED standards.

fieldInspection.title: Field Inspection & Coordination
fieldInspection.description: On-site NDT management, welding supervision, and coating inspections.
fieldInspection.imageAlt: NDT field inspection and welding supervision
items: On-site NDT management and welding supervision
Coating inspections and paint thickness verification
Steel quality verification before yard departure
NCR reduction and client escalation prevention
Experience across offshore wind and heavy industry

remoteMDR.title: Remote MDR Management
remoteMDR.description: Automated Manufacturing Data Report compilation and audit readiness.
items: Automated MDR compilation and structuring
Material traceability and weld log verification
Real-time tracking of inspection and test records
Audit-ready documentation at any time
AI-assisted consistency checks and gap identification

docControl.title: Documentation Review & Control
docControl.description: Expert QA/QC review of fabrication documentation and drawings.
items: Review of isometric drawings and technical documentation
P&ID and fabrication drawing verification
Document control, revision tracking, and version management
Verification of document completeness against standards

welding.title: Welding & Fabrication Documentation
items: Review of welding documentation (WPS, PQR, WPQ)
Welding maps and weld traceability matrices
Material traceability documentation (heat numbers, traceability records)
Verification of welder qualifications and approvals

quality.title: QA / QC Services
quality.description: On-site pipeline inspections, quality control tools, and compliance verification.
quality.imageAlt: Field engineer performing pipeline inspection with PPE
items: Inspection & Test Plan (ITP) preparation, review, and verification
Review of inspection reports and quality records
RFIs documentation support and follow-up
NCR documentation support and corrective action tracking

vendor.title: Vendor & Manufacturer Documentation
items: Manufacturer and vendor documentation follow-up
Review of data books and supplier documentation
Coordination of missing or incomplete documentation
Interface support between vendors, contractors, and clients

completion.title: Mechanical Completion & Handover
items: Mechanical Completion documentation support
As-built documentation review and compilation
MDR / DDP (Manufacturing Data Record / Document Data Package) compilation
Final handover dossiers preparation and verification

audit.title: Audit & Client Support
items: Pre-audit documentation checks and readiness reviews
Client and third-party audit documentation support
Alignment of documentation with contractual and standard requirements

remote.title: Remote QA/QC Support
items: Remote quality documentation support for ongoing projects
Flexible support tailored to project phases and workloads
Efficient collaboration with site teams and project management

smartQAQC.label: POWERED BY AI
smartQAQC.title: Smart QA/QC: Powered by Pipeline Quality AI
smartQAQC.description: Manual logs are the graveyard of project margins. In partnership with BW Digit, we develop custom tools to automate MDR generation, cross-check material traceability, and flag inconsistencies before audits, ensuring full traceability across MTRs, weld logs and NDT reports.

standards.label: STANDARDS & COMPLIANCE
standards.title: Working in accordance with recognized international standards.
standards.description: Our QA/QC documentation support aligns with internationally recognized standards and project-specific requirements, ensuring compliance, traceability and audit readiness.
standards.frameworkDescription: Our QA/QC documentation support is aligned with commonly applied international standards, including but not limited to:
standardsList: ISO 15614 / ISO 9606 – Welding procedure and welder qualification
EN and DIN standards applicable to industrial fabrication and installation
standards.auditNote: Documentation is prepared with audit readiness in mind, supporting internal and external audits.
standards.qualifications: Relevant auditor qualifications and technical certifications are available upon request.
standards.scopeNote: Standards are applied strictly within the scope defined by the client and project documentation.

industries.label: INDUSTRIES
industries.title: Industries & Standards We Work With
industries.description: Oil & Gas, Pipeline Construction, EPC Contractors, QA/QC & Inspection Support
industries.standardsAlt: ISO, ASME, API, EN standards for pipeline QA/QC
industries.experienceNote: Our experience includes large-scale industrial projects executed under strict quality and safety requirements across Europe and worldwide.

workProcess.label: HOW WE WORK
workProcess.title: Structured. Transparent. Reliable.
steps: Document review based on client specs & standards
Clear feedback, tracking lists & action points
Final documentation ready for audit & handover
workProcess.tagline: Clear ownership, clear deadlines, clear documentation.

why.label: WHY PIPELINE QUALITY
why.title: Why Pipeline Quality
points: Real project experience – not theoretical consulting
Strong understanding of EPC & operator requirements
Focus on documentation quality, traceability & compliance

reasons.title: Real Project Experience
reasons.description: Hands-on experience gained within large-scale European industrial projects, not theoretical consulting.

reasons.title: Strong EPC Understanding
reasons.description: Deep understanding of EPC workflows, documentation requirements and project pressures.

reasons.title: Remote-First Flexibility
reasons.description: Flexible remote support models aligned with project phases, workload and timelines.

reasons.title: Documentation That Works
reasons.description: Practical, usable documentation designed for real project execution and audits.

reasons.title: European Standards Focus
reasons.description: Strong alignment with European regulations, EN/DIN standards and client-specific requirements.

reasons.title: Clear Communication
reasons.description: Direct, structured communication in English and German, ensuring clarity and accountability.

why.companyInfo: Pipeline Quality is operated by Backpack Wander GmbH, registered in Germany and based in Berlin. We collaborate with a network of experienced QA/QC professionals and scale our support according to project needs.

items.question: What is remote QA/QC documentation support?
items.answer: Remote QA/QC documentation support means managing, reviewing and preparing all quality-related project documentation without permanent site presence, ensuring compliance with project specifications and standards.

items.question: Do you work only remotely?
items.answer: Our primary focus is remote documentation support. On-site support can be coordinated through our professional network if required.

items.question: Which standards do you work with?
items.answer: We work according to ISO 9001, ISO 45001, project-specific EPC requirements, welding standards and client specifications.

items.question: Which industries do you support?
items.answer: Pipeline construction, oil & gas, chemical and petrochemical plants, energy, utilities and industrial installations.

items.question: Can you support audits and client inspections?
items.answer: Yes. Documentation is prepared with audit-readiness in mind and supports both internal and external audits.

items.question: Do you support EPC contractors and engineering companies?
items.answer: Yes. We regularly support EPC contractors, engineering companies and operators with structured QA/QC documentation aligned with project and contractual requirements.

cta.title: Ready to streamline your project's quality documentation?
cta.description: Whether you need short-term QA/QC documentation support or long-term remote involvement, we are ready to support your project with structured and reliable solutions.
cta.responseNote: We respond fast and work transparently

contact.title: Request QA/QC & Quality Support
contact.subtitle: Let's discuss your QA/QC documentation needs
contact.description: Please upload relevant project documentation or describe your QA/QC needs. Our team will respond within 48–72 hours.

sections.title: EU Dispute Resolution
sections.content:
The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://europa.eu.
We are not obliged or willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.title: 1. General Information
sections.content:
The protection of your personal data is a high priority for Backpack Wander GmbH.
This Privacy Policy explains how we process personal data within our online offer and for our brand Pipeline Quality.

sections.title: 2. Controller (Responsible Entity)
sections.content:
The entity responsible for data processing is:

Backpack Wander GmbH
Kolonnenstrasse 8, 10827 Berlin, Germany
Managing Director: Biljana Habel, M.Sc.

For general & legal inquiries: info@backpackwander.com
For project & brand inquiries: info@pipelinequality.com

sections.title: 3. Hosting and Content Delivery Networks (CDN)
sections.content:
Our website is hosted by Vercel Inc. (650 California St, San Francisco, CA 94108, USA). Vercel collects server log files (including IP address, browser type, and timestamps) to ensure the technical security and stability of the site.

Legal Basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (Legitimate interest).
Data Transfer: Vercel is certified under the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework, ensuring a level of data protection compliant with EU standards.

sections.title: 4. Data Collection & Processing
sections.content:
Contact Forms & File Uploads: Data submitted via forms or file uploads is processed solely to handle your inquiry and manage project-related communication. (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).

WhatsApp Communication: If you contact us via WhatsApp, we process your phone number and chat history exclusively for business purposes. Please note that WhatsApp's own privacy terms apply.

Google Analytics: We use Google Analytics with IP Anonymization enabled. This requires your explicit consent via our cookie banner. (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).

sections.title: 5. Your Rights (Data Subject Rights)
sections.content:
You have the right to access (Art. 15), rectify (Art. 16), or erase (Art. 17) your data, as well as the right to restrict processing (Art. 18) and data portability (Art. 20).
You may withdraw your consent at any time.
To exercise these rights, please contact us at info@pipelinequality.com.

sections.title: 1. Scope of Application
sections.content: These General Terms and Conditions apply to all services, offers, and contracts provided by Backpack Wander GmbH (hereinafter "the Provider") specifically under the brand "Pipeline Quality".

sections.title: 2. Services
sections.content:
The Provider offers specialized technical and engineering services, including:
- Technical consultancy and engineering support.
- QA/QC documentation and inspection services.
- Project-related remote and on-site support.
- Provision of technical digital products and online offerings.

sections.title: 3. Contractual Partner
sections.content:
The sole contractual partner is
Backpack Wander GmbH, Kolonnenstrasse 8, 10827 Berlin, Managing Director: Biljana Habel, M.Sc.

sections.title: 4. Liability
sections.content:
- The Provider is liable for intent and gross negligence.
- For slight negligence, the Provider is only liable in the event of a breach of an essential contractual obligation (cardinal obligation). In such cases, liability is limited to the typical, foreseeable damage.
- Liability for injury to life, body or health remains unaffected.
- The Provider provides services based on the current state of technology.

sections.title: 5. Digital Products
sections.content: For the purchase of digital products or technical templates, the right of withdrawal expires once the performance of the contract has begun with the consumer's prior express consent.

sections.title: 6. Final Provisions
sections.content:
- The laws of the Federal Republic of Germany apply.
- Place of jurisdiction is Berlin, Germany.
